name: Swanmon

signature_move.name: DownTornado
signature_move.description: Spreads its wings, and engulfs the opponent in an intensely whirling cold wind and feathers, tearing them apart with its sharp-pointed feathers.

description: An Armor-level Bird Digimon that evolved through the power of the " Digimental of Love ". The appearance of its white body, long neck and wings spread out is divine. It has a habit of preferring to live in cold regions, and it is said that when Swanmon passes through the Network , computers " Freeze ". It used to be a species that behaved in bevies, but lately it often acts alone. Although the cause is unknown, it is said that a rise in atmospheric temperature within the Digital World may be the reason. Its Special Move is " Down Tornado ". It spreads its wings, and engulfs the opponent in an intensely whirling cold wind and feathers, tearing them apart with its sharp-pointed feathers.
